description.s: Library for auto-generating SVG diagrams from item metadata. Returns DOM nodes for use with functional transclusion.
— Declarative event flow diagram showing all
wiring. Events on the left, subscriber items on the right, curved paths with filter annotations. Click any box to navigate to that item.
— Idea item with full design notes

eventFlow.name: eventFlow
eventFlow.description:
Render declarative event flow as an interactive SVG diagram.
Usage in markdown: ![](item://diagram-lib?call=eventFlow)
